response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack software developer with strong web, backend, and DLang experience, but the resume shows no relevant background in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator performance analysis, hardware-software co-design, GPU/SIMD/MIMD architecture, or deep neural network optimization. The role is a Principal Performance Architect for hardware accelerators, which requires deep silicon and ML systems expertise that is entirely absent here.
strengths: 15+ years of broad software engineering experience across multiple stacks
Low-latency systems work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic with async I/O and high-throughput services
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, testing, and developer tooling
concerns: No SoC, IP modeling, or hardware architecture experience whatsoever
No demonstrated background in AI accelerators, GPU architecture, or DNN training/inference optimization
Educational background (BS CS) without the years of relevant hardware/performance experience the role demands

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or DNN optimization experience
